{ "name": "illuminate/macroable", "description": "The Illuminate Macroable package.", "license": "MIT", "homepage": "https://laravel.com", "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/laravel/framework/issues", "source": "https://github.com/laravel/framework" }, "authors": [ { "name": "Taylor Otwell", "email": "taylor@laravel.com" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.2" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Illuminate\\Support\\": "" } }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "12.x-dev" } }, "config": { "sort-packages": true }, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
